    sysutils/screen: Fix plist

    PLIST doesn't like "_" in variable names. Fix by renaming
    MULTIUSER_SCREEN to MULTIUSER.

    PR:             262903
    Reported by:    sunpoet, Michael Butler <imb@protected-networks.net>
    Fixes:          8f528507e9ca
    Pointy hat to:  cy
